summary: Pass-2 blocking findings and required warnings were revised in place on 2026-05-14. Spec §7 now requires hidden-field rejection audit emission, the plan defines local helpers/fixtures for the previously undefined test setup, Task 11 uses the real guided emitter test path, the nullable return-path cases are covered by explicit Task 3/Task 14 tests, and Tasks 5/8 now use the same structural getattr/callable discriminated-plugin dispatch pattern. A targeted grep check found no remaining pass-2 no-go strings.

notes: PASS2-BLK-1 resolved by amending spec §7 case 10 to require guided_hidden_field_rejected before 400.
PASS2-BLK-2 resolved by adding inline helper/fixture definitions for Tasks 8, 12, 13, and 17.
PASS2-BLK-3 resolved by replacing Task 11 emitter test path with tests/unit/web/composer/guided/test_emitters.py.
PASS2-WARN-1 resolved by adding explicit tests for §7 cases 1, 2, and 4 and narrowing the self-review claim.
PASS2-WARN-2 resolved by using getattr/callable dispatch consistently in Tasks 5 and 8.

prior_pass_summary.regressions_introduced: 2 new reality blockers, 2 new quality blockers, 0 new architecture or systems blockers

blocking_findings.title: Spec/plan contradiction on hidden-field-rejection audit emission
blocking_findings.description: Spec §7 case 10 previously contradicted Task 13 on whether hidden-field rejection should emit audit evidence.
evidence: resolved spec §7 case 10: hidden-field rejection now emits guided_hidden_field_rejected before 400
plan Task 13: assertion that audit row is emitted remains aligned with spec
plan Task 13: helper call is now emit_hidden_field_rejected
blocking_findings.policy_assessment: Plan's choice (emit audit) aligns with CLAUDE.md audit primacy principle. Spec's choice (no audit) is the divergent position. Recommend amending spec to match plan.
blocking_findings.resolution: Applied option (a): spec §7 case 10 now requires `guided_hidden_field_rejected` audit emission before the HTTP 400, matching Task 13 and the audit-primacy policy.
blocking_findings.risk_if_not_addressed: Implementation will diverge from spec; downstream audit-trail completeness claim will be inconsistent between spec text and runtime behavior.

blocking_findings.title: Undefined test helper functions across multiple tasks
blocking_findings.description: Test helpers and fixtures were called in plan pseudocode but not defined. Independently flagged by Reality (WARN-A, WARN-D) and Quality (NEW-BLK-2, NEW-WARN-1).
blocking_findings.resolution: Inline helper/fixture definitions added for Tasks 8, 12, 13, and 17. The stale helper reference was superseded by the explicit `emit_hidden_field_rejected()` implementation target.
blocking_findings.risk_if_not_addressed: Tasks will fail at execution time with NameError; executor must improvise definitions, defeating plan-as-spec discipline.

blocking_findings.title: Wrong file path in Task 11 emitter test references
blocking_findings.description: Task 11 previously cited the unguided emitter test path; actual file is at `tests/unit/web/composer/guided/test_emitters.py`.
blocking_findings.resolution: All Task 11 emitter test references now use `tests/unit/web/composer/guided/test_emitters.py`.
blocking_findings.risk_if_not_addressed: Executor will create or edit the wrong file; tests will not be discovered or will collide with adjacent unrelated tests.

warnings.title: Self-review §7 case-coverage claim is false (recurrence of pass-1 pattern)
warnings.description: Plan self-review overstated Task 3 coverage for the nullable return-path cases.
warnings.resolution: Added Task 3 tests for cases 1 and 2, added Task 14 required-text clear coverage for case 4, and narrowed the self-review row to Task 3 cases 1-3 plus Task 14 case 4.

warnings.title: Inconsistent runtime-checkable Protocol dispatch (isinstance vs getattr/callable)
warnings.description: Task 5 and Task 8 previously used different runtime detection patterns for discriminated plugins. Three reviewers independently caught this.
warnings.resolution: Task 8 now uses the same `getattr(..., "discriminated_variants", None)` plus `callable(...)` dispatch pattern as Task 5; spec wording now describes structural Protocol behavior.
warnings.mitigation_present: Defense-in-depth at startup catches mismatches; practical impact is low.

warnings.title: Task 8 attribute-name verification deferred to execution time
warnings.description: Task 8 pseudocode uses `self._source_classes` before assignment; plan instructs executor to grep service.py before pasting (line 1388). Honest disclosure but execution-time bomb if executor skips the grep step.
warnings.resolution: Either (a) verify attribute name during plan finalization and inline correct name, or (b) accept the documented mitigation.

warnings.title: DB-wipe language does not match project memory policy
warnings.description: Plan previously used ambiguous clearing wording instead of the literal sessions-DB deletion policy.
warnings.resolution: Task 9 now states: existing persisted guided sessions using schema version 3 are intentionally incompatible; the operator deletes the sessions DB before deploy.

warnings.title: Stale file-structure reference for hidden-field rejection test
warnings.description: File structure section (line 66) lists wrong path for hidden-field rejection test. Task 13 itself uses correct path. Cosmetic stale reference.

warnings.title: Task 13 KeyError catch discards triggering key info
warnings.description: Task 13 line 1824 catches KeyError with `continue`, discarding info about which key triggered. Acceptable for guard pattern but loses diagnostic value.
warnings.resolution: Capture the key in the except clause and include it in any subsequent emission/log; trivial change.

warnings.title: Phase C2 -> Phase D intermediate state not explicitly declared benign
warnings.description: Phase C2 reorder eliminates the regression window from pass 1, but the intermediate state between C2 completion and D start is not explicitly documented as benign. Documentation gap only.
warnings.resolution: Add a one-line note to Phase C2 describing the intermediate state.

warnings.title: Self-review framing of spec §7 cases 5-8 is misleading
warnings.description: Cases 5-8 ARE forward-path tests covered by Tasks 2-3; the self-review framing is wrong but coverage exists. Cosmetic accuracy issue separate from PASS2-WARN-1.

convergence_findings.topic: Self-review accuracy as recurring process pattern

strengths: All 12 reality hallucinations from pass 1 resolved
3 architecture blockers (B-1, B-2, B-3) resolved at root, not papered over
3 systems blockers resolved including Phase D atomic-commit protocol.py landing in Tasks 10 + 15
Phase C2 reorder eliminates the regression window flagged in pass 1
Phase D pre-commit gate complete: ruff + mypy + tier-model + freeze-guards
Freeze-guard contract honored throughout new dataclass introductions
4 of 6 quality blockers fully resolved including BLK-1 Hypothesis+golden coverage
Plan author shipped 86KB -> 106KB of useful expansion without bloat
execution_recommendations: Operator decides PASS2-BLK-1 spec/plan contradiction first - preferred direction is amend spec to require audit emission per CLAUDE.md audit primacy
Plan author resolves PASS2-BLK-2 by inlining helper/fixture definitions in the four named tasks
Plan author fixes PASS2-BLK-3 file path in Task 11 (3 occurrences)
Plan author resolves PASS2-WARN-1 by either adding spec §7 case 1/2/4 tests or correcting the self-review claim - strongly recommend adding the tests since the self-review pattern has now recurred
Plan author selects one DiscriminatedPlugin dispatch pattern (PASS2-WARN-2) and applies uniformly across Tasks 5 and 8
Other warnings can be addressed in-flight during execution
Pass 3 is NOT needed if the operator revises in place; the structural spine is sound and remaining defects are correctable without re-architecting

process_observations.observation: Plan self-review accuracy is a recurring weak point
evidence: Pass 2: §7 case-1-4 claim is still false (only case 3 is tested)
process_observations.recommendation: Add a self-review verification step to the planning workflow: before declaring a self-review section complete, grep the plan body for the claimed coverage and confirm it exists. The claims-vs-content mismatch has now appeared in two consecutive passes.
